workshoptitle: Build Financial Intelligence with Oracle Database 26ai

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: The Seer Bank finance intelligence story and workshop goals.

tutorials.title: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Launch the environment and open Database Actions SQL Worksheet.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Finance Data Foundation
tutorials.description: Inspect the finance schema foundation and current object families.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Risk and Operations Dashboard
tutorials.description: Query dashboard KPIs, signal exposure, and product risk evidence.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Transaction and Case Documents
tutorials.description: Use JSON Relational Duality and SQL/JSON for transaction documents.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Risk Signal Intelligence
tutorials.description: Run AI Vector Search over product and signal embeddings.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Financial Crime Network
tutorials.description: Use Property Graph and SQL/PGQ to analyze fraud reach.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Client Service and SLA Coverage
tutorials.description: Use Oracle Spatial for service center and SLA region analysis.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Predictive Risk, Capacity, and Revenue
tutorials.description: Inspect and score OML models inside Oracle Database.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Governed Data Copilot
tutorials.description: Ground trusted answers in approved finance views and visible SQL.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: AI Operations Agent Console
tutorials.description: Call trusted PL/SQL tools and inspect action audit history.

tutorials.title: Lab 10: Conclusion
tutorials.description: Connect the finance decision path into one operating pattern.

tutorials.title: Lab 11: Final Quiz
tutorials.description: Check your understanding with scored questions.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving Live Help.
